title: geraniospermum minimum
intro: Geraniospermum minimum, also known as Thai Pepper or Chinese Pepper, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum minimum include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory issues.
